data.title: Add ## AI Blindspot Annotations to reviewer-delta-deep-correctness.md (spaghetti patching + asymmetric change)
data.description: Insert ## AI Blindspot Annotations section before ## Overlay Classification in reviewer-delta-deep-correctness.md. Content: spaghetti patching detection (defensive conditionals masking root causes; near-duplicate paths) and asymmetric change detection (schema/interface change without updating callers). All checks in summary field ONLY. Run build-review-agents.sh. Commit delta + all 10 agents. testing_mode: UPDATE.
